authors.name: Priya Nair
authors.title: Registered Dietitian & Health Writer
authors.bio: Priya writes on nutrition, metabolic health, and preventive care. She trained as a registered dietitian and spent six years in clinical practice before moving into health journalism, and she still sees a small number of patients each month.

authors.name: Marcus Webb
authors.title: Health & Fitness Correspondent
authors.bio: Marcus covers fitness science, exercise physiology, and men's health. His reporting focuses on separating well-supported findings from fitness-industry hype, drawing on a background in sports science research.

authors.name: Dr. Sara Jensen
authors.title: Physician & Contributing Editor
authors.bio: Sara is a practicing family physician and contributing medical editor. She reviews clinical accuracy across the site and writes on women's health, mental health, and preventive screening.

authors.name: James Okoro
authors.title: Public Health Reporter
authors.bio: James reports on public health policy, infectious disease, and health systems. He previously worked in epidemiological surveillance before moving into full-time health journalism.
